idx.tooltip_md: Define 'Release Date' according to contract. If not provable with evidence, output 'unk' with unknown_reason.
Define 'Discontinued' according to contract. If not provable with evidence, output 'unk' with unknown_reason.
Define 'SKU / Part #' according to contract. If not provable with evidence, output 'unk' with unknown_reason.
MSRP price bracket or stated MSRP. Keep as a string token; do not guess if not public.
Colorway tokens. Use list<string>. Normalize grey?gray; multi-colorways may use '+'.
